name: brain_state
description: Read or modify Pi-Chi brain state: goals, personality, wake config, activity log

action.description: Action: 'read' to view state, 'goals' for current goals, 'activity' for recent actions, 'personality' for personality config

target.description: State file or section to read (e.g. 'all', 'goals', 'activity', 'personality', 'config')
